title: White House in Spotlight… Again
summary:
Main
Image reference: tankers-secondary.jpg | assets/2025-02-10_white-house-in-spotlight-again_img_tankers-secondary_0d029e248e3f.jpg
It has been another turbulent week in the oil and tanker markets. tariffs on Canada and Mexico were postponed for a month, the 10% tariff on all Chinese products took effect on February 4, with Beijing swiftly retaliating, imposing a 10% tariff on U.S. crude exports and a 15% duty on LNG and coal exports starting February 10, whilst some other measures were also implemented.
